name: Resend
philosophy: Resend's marketing surfaces sit on a near-pure black canvas with off-white text and a single signature color — the deep editorial-serif Domaine Display headline mark — that gives an otherwise utilitarian developer-tool brand its print-magazine confidence.
trademark_signals: Pure black canvas (#000000) on every public page; off-white text (#fcfdff) carries the full read
A serif-led type system: Domaine Display at 76–96px for hero headlines, ABC Favorit for marketing body, Inter for UI, Geist Mono for code
Six accent glow colours used only as low-opacity atmospheric washes (,, ) — never as buttons or solid surfaces
Strict container vocabulary: (12px) for feature cards, code wells, and email mockups; (8px) for buttons; for pills and avatars
Translucent white borders ( 6% / 14%) replace shadows entirely — the system has no traditional drop-shadow elevation language
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use a near-black canvas. The brand sits on #000000, not #0a0a0a
Don't apply solid colour to atmospheric accent tokens. is for inline highlights only
Don't add drop shadows to feature cards or code wells. Translucent white borders carry depth on this canvas
